arts.ttl: Manchester City keeps tabs on wonderkid’s situation – Jorge Mendes handling contract talks
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal is the generational talent whose performances in the European Championships for Spain earned him worldwide recognition. The 17-year-old is likely to be a future Ballon d’Or winner in the future and even though Barcelona are cash-strapped, they won’t sell the winger at any price.
